tools.name: ping
tools.summary: Liveness check; returns { ok, version }.

tools.name: capabilities
tools.summary: Return this self-describing capability manifest (tools + features + versions).

tools.name: reload
tools.summary: Reload the extension (re-reads dist/ from disk).

tools.name: debug_exec
tools.summary: Diagnostic: probe in-page bridge availability.

tools.name: detach
tools.summary: Detach the debugger from the target tab.

tools.name: set_bridge_port
tools.summary: Set the WebSocket bridge port (persists across reload; enables multi-session on different ports).

tools.name: navigate
tools.summary: Navigate the console tab to a scoped https URL.

tools.name: login
tools.summary: Drive the F5 XC OIDC/Keycloak login end-to-end.

tools.name: scroll_to
tools.summary: Scroll an AX-ref element into view.

tools.name: resize_window
tools.summary: Resize the browser window.

tools.name: tabs_list
tools.summary: List scoped console tabs.

tools.name: tabs_create
tools.summary: Open a new tab at a scoped URL.

tools.name: tabs_close
tools.summary: Close a tab by id.

tools.name: click
tools.summary: Deterministic click of an AX-ref element (layout-engine coords + hit-test).

tools.name: click_element
tools.summary: Click the element returned by a JS expression (polls; occlusion-safe).

tools.name: click_xy
tools.summary: Trusted click at explicit viewport coordinates.

tools.name: type_text
tools.summary: Type text into the focused element (trusted input).

tools.name: form_input
tools.summary: Set a form field value by AX ref.

tools.name: key_press
tools.summary: Dispatch a key press.

tools.name: select_option
tools.summary: Select an option in a native <select> by AX ref.

tools.name: label_select
tools.summary: Type into a CDK-portal typeahead and click the matching option.

tools.name: file_upload
tools.summary: Upload files (base64 data URIs) to a file input by AX ref.

tools.name: read_ax
tools.summary: Read the accessibility tree of the page.

tools.name: get_page_text
tools.summary: Return the page text.

tools.name: query_dom
tools.summary: Direct DOM.querySelector at wire speed — bypasses Runtime.evaluate for simple CSS selectors.

tools.name: find
tools.summary: Find AX nodes matching a locator.

tools.name: wait_for
tools.summary: Wait for an AX node matching a locator to appear.

tools.name: assert_text
tools.summary: Assert an element contains expected text.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.summary: Capture a screenshot (base64 PNG).

tools.name: read_console
tools.summary: Read buffered console messages, optionally filtered by pattern.

tools.name: read_network
tools.summary: Read buffered network events, optionally filtered by pattern.

tools.name: diag_suspension
tools.summary: Diagnostic: SW-lifecycle event buffer + suspension summary (Phase 0a).

tools.name: diag_bridges
tools.summary: List discovered xcsh bridges (port, tenant, env, sessionId, lastSeen) for multi-session diagnostics.

tools.name: capture_login_flow
tools.summary: Diagnostic: captured login redirect chain annotated with tenant/env (Phase 0b).

tools.name: wait_for_api_response
tools.summary: Wait for a network response whose URL matches a pattern.

tools.name: get_page_context
tools.summary: Return a snapshot of the active console page (url, AX tree, captured XC API body) for chat grounding.

tools.name: javascript_tool
tools.summary: Evaluate arbitrary JS in the page (length-capped).

tools.name: browser_batch
tools.summary: Run a batch of { tool, params } actions in sequence.

tools.name: set_explain_mode
tools.summary: Enter/leave explain mode — the gate for all on-page annotation overlays.

tools.name: annotate
tools.summary: Draw an overlay annotation (fingerprint/highlight). No-op unless explain mode is on.

explainMode.description: A deliberate, human-paced walkthrough mode. While on, on-page annotation overlays are shown; off by default (fast automation shows nothing).

overlays.description: Transient annotation overlays. In explain mode, clicks auto-draw a fingerprint; `annotate` draws a named overlay by ref or coordinates.

capture.description: Capture a screenshot (base64 PNG) — for headless annotated-capture flows.

chat.description: User ↔ xcsh chat over the bridge. The extension side panel sends chat_request (with mode and page-context snapshot); xcsh streams chat_delta tokens then a terminal chat_done (with reference links) or chat_error. Chat ids are prefixed "c-". Tool calls during a turn use the normal tool_request flow. chat_stop halts a streaming response. chat_tool_notice is emitted by the EXTENSION (the service worker) to the panel as a best-effort UI signal when a tool runs during a turn — it is NOT sent by xcsh; xcsh must not produce it to avoid double-rendering in the panel.

promptHints.role: You are xcsh, the AI assistant embedded in the F5 Distributed Cloud (XC) console side panel. The user is viewing a live console page; help them drive automation and understand settings and their purpose.
promptHints.grounding: Every user message carries a page-context snapshot: url/path, title, a trimmed accessibility tree, and — when available — the live XC API resource JSON the page loaded (context.api.body). Treat context.api.body as the authoritative current state of the resource and ground answers in it instead of guessing; respect the truncated flags.
promptHints.referenceLinks: Emit every citation as a markdown link [title](url): F5 XC docs (docs.cloud.f5.com) as doc references and the tenant console host as console deep-links. These populate the panel References drawer, so always format references this way rather than as bare URLs.
promptHints.toolUse: Drive the console with the extension tools via the normal tool_request flow (navigate, click, annotate, screenshot, get_page_context, and so on). The extension surfaces tool activity to the panel itself (chat_tool_notice) — never emit chat_tool_notice yourself. Each turn ends with exactly one terminal frame, which the transport handles.

modes.educational: Explain concepts and answer questions about settings and their purpose.
modes.presentation: Guided, human-paced walkthrough/demo of the console.
modes.configuration: Help build and fill F5 XC resource configuration.
modes.annotation: Annotate the page for documentation and teaching.
